title: Lucky's Showcase
description: A mod for showcasing your tools, weapons and items!
body:
![Lucky's Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f958e50c3b1e452f89e06616421c7f0cbaf1fe92_0.webp)
![Tool Racks!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b66574fd9f6a1f1aed9ae3ccf8e8940cd8cdc1df_0.webp)
![Shields on Racks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7426d01e0acc3def3ea315acb57b444d8ebaee11_0.webp)
![Weapon Stands](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5cffc010dfebf0a667170be6239ca0b6c18d3a5c_0.webp)
![Trident on Display](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3485f414f37d0c84413508e766f9fee644fbdfeb_0.webp)
![Check Out My Other Mods!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f813f1a576b5ef8972a18cc7b70c64026ad2d29c.png)![Join The Discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d9c0bc3a225f3c0a4655cbe81d6ff766fdcb4064.png)

Translation:
Lucky's Showcase is a vanilla-friendly Minecraft mod that lets you display your favorite items in style. Whether it’s a prized weapon, trusty tool, or a rare treasure from your adventures, Lucky’s Showcase offers decorative blocks to show it off.

This mod adds:
- Tool Racks: Great for easy access to tools and weapons on the fly! Shields can also be placed on rack, and their banner pattern will show too! Additionally, shields on racks will block projectiles like shields do!
- Weapon Stands: Have a favorite tool or weapon? The Weapon Stand is great for making it the centerpiece of any build.
